w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: An industrial database is not just a list of firms.
When designed properly, it becomes the backbone for:
requires structured, multi-dimensional information that supports policy planning, industrial development, technology roadmapping, investment decisions, and ecosystem coordination.
Specialized skills (e.g., battery engineering, AI, embedded systems)
ecosystem analysis and SNA (Social Network Analysis):
An effective industrial database should allow:
